name: Cream Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the bread ingredients to room temperature and pour them into the bakery bowl in order.
2. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock.
3. Select "white bread" setting and press Start.
Comments: This recipe produces a delicious dessert bread or cake. For added flavor, try placing raisins, chocolate chips, nuts, dried fruits, or other items on the raisin setting before starting. Tested in DAK R2D2. Sylvia's comments (Source: Bread Machine CB 1, posted on GEnie by C.SVITEK [Cathy], MM by Sylvia Steiger, GEnie THE.STEIGERS, CI$ 71511,2253).
